arts.ttl: 'Shining light in dark days': Reading fans send emotional messages to departing boss
arts.sum: Reading fans have sent in dozens of messages of thanks to Ruben Selles as the popular Spaniard is set to depart for Hull City. Taking over last summer, the former Southampton chief guided the club to 17th in League One during his debut campaign and has the club sixth in the division as he looks set to join Championship strugglers Hull City. A hero among the fanbase, Selles has had to contend with late wages, losing staff to redundancy and players sold behind his back, not to mention to removal of overnight trips last season and ready meals for pre-match preparation.

arts.ttl: Latest Reading bidders revealed as turbulent week rages on at football club
arts.sum: The mystery group behind Reading Football Club's latest period of exclusivity is Blue Horizon, the Reading Chronicle understands. Set up and run by Paul Taylor, Blue Horizon have been in negotiations with the club in recent months and have been in exclusivity since Rob Couhig's deal ended somewhat abruptly. Based in London, the firm had nearly £400m of assets under management as of May 2024, according to their website, and over £500m of client commitments.

arts.ttl: Preview: Wycombe Wanderers vs. Reading - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Wycombe Wanderers and Reading, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
